name: Rice Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice according to package instructions in vegetable broth instead of water.
2. Drain and rinse the cooked rice.
3. Add 1/2 can spiced Italian tomatoes, chopped parsley, and drained brown beans to the cooked rice.
4. Stir in 6-12 fresh or canned oyster mushrooms.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight if preparing ahead.
6. In the morning, heat the mixture in a microwave for 3 minutes at high power.
